METADATA.description: Meso-relational spatial mapping: which gates and indicators affect which locations. Multipliers refine base predictions when upstream sensors confirm active patterns.

thermal_engine.description: NW wind from Great Salt Lake accelerates through Point of the Mountain gap

canyon_boost.description: SE canyon drainage funnels into lake thermal — 2hr lead time

valley_confirmation.description: Point of Mountain confirms north flow is reaching the lake

thermal_engine.description: When Provo stays light, SE thermal develops freely on south shore

north_flow.description: NW flow from SLC pushes south to Lincoln — KPVU confirms arrival

thermal_engine.description: KPVU is closest meter — light winds allow thermal to develop
S/SSW/W winds are onshore at Vineyard. SE is offshore/dangerous.

stability_cap.description: Strong NW at Flight Park can create cross-shore chop at Vineyard

thermal_engine.description: Spanish Fork canyon drainage is primary wind source for MM19
Provo Canyon venturi effect: warm valley air drawn up canyon when Heber is cooler

arrowhead_trigger.description: Arrowhead SSW wind 12-18 mph = thermal at dam in ~60 min

stability_cap.description: Arrowhead wind >20 mph = high-altitude turbulence disrupts surface thermal

thermal_engine.description: South flow — south beach near state park, Hill AFB confirms strength

stability_cap.description: Ben Lomond strong wind = frontal passage, not thermal

switch_logic.description: Wind switch from S to N typically 3-5 PM. KSLC leads by 30-60 min.

north_engine.description: NW flow at SLC airport = north side active within 30-60 min

south_engine.description: S flow at Provo = south side active (morning pattern)

NORTH_CLIFF.description: Day-over-day temp drop signals incoming cold front / north push
NORTH_CLIFF.label: Frontal Push Likely

prefrontal_boost.description: Day BEFORE the cliff is often the best wind day — warm prefrontal surge
prefrontal_boost.label: Pre-Frontal Spike
prefrontal_boost.typical_wind: Strong S/SW before switch to NW

SOUTH_CLIMB.description: Day-over-day temp rise signals building thermal potential or south surge
SOUTH_CLIMB.label: South Surge Likely

MODERATE_DROP.description: Smaller temp drop still significant for wind direction change
MODERATE_DROP.label: Cool Change Coming

SWING_MONITOR.description: Real-time monitoring for rapid weather changes using PWS and station data

FRONTAL_HIT.message: Frontal Boundary Hit: Rapid temp drop detected
FRONTAL_HIT.wind_expectation: Immediate north surge, possible strong gusts
